# Blueby Art Shop

> Blueby Art Shop offers monthly kids art subscriptions plus one-time art kits for ages 4 and up.

## What We Offer

- Monthly subscription tiers with art activities for different skill levels
- One-time kits including plaster figures, coloring books, 3D figure projects, party kits, and wholesale bundles
- Account-based checkout and subscription management powered by Stripe and Supabase-backed site flows

## Subscription Plans

- **Mini Artist** — $24.99/month + $4.99 shipping — Ages 4 and up
- **Creative Explorer** — $39.99/month + $4.99 shipping — Ages 4 and up (Most Popular)
- **Master Creator** — $69.99/month, free shipping — Ages 4 and up (Coming Soon)

## Core Facts

- Age range: 4 and up
- Shop URL: https://bluebyartshop.com/shop
- Subscribe URL: https://bluebyartshop.com/subscribe
- Contact URL: https://bluebyartshop.com/contact
- Privacy policy: https://bluebyartshop.com/privacy
- Terms of service: https://bluebyartshop.com/terms
- Shipping and returns: https://bluebyartshop.com/shipping-returns
- General support: hello@bluebyartshop.com
- Wholesale support: wholesale@bluebyartshop.com

## More Context

- Full reference: https://bluebyartshop.com/llms-full.txt
- JSON context: https://bluebyartshop.com/api/llms-context
